categories.name: success_via_decomposition
categories.evidence: Agent decomposed a new-API-endpoint task into: (1) create migration, (2) add model, (3) write serializer, (4) implement view, (5) add URL route. Five files edited in correct dependency order. Trajectory shows deliberate planning before first edit.

annotations.notes: Exemplar: correct decomposition of a complex multi-file task into ordered steps.
